blocks.text: Bernabéu night: Bayern vs Real Madrid, Europe's biggest stage
Arsenal arrive in Lisbon nine points clear at the top of the Premier League — Arteta's side chasing glory on two fronts. A first-leg result in Portugal could be season-defining.
